overview:
JSValue  compare(_:) Instance Methodcompare(_:)iOS 18.0+iPadOS 18.0+Mac Catalyst 18.0+macOS 15.0+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 2.0+func compare(_ other: Double) -> JSRelationConditionReturn ValueA value of JSRelationCondition, a kJSRelationConditionUndefined is returned if an exception is thrown.

Compare a JSValue with a double.

The JSValue is converted to a double according to the rules specified by the JavaScript language then compared with other.

# compare(_:) | Apple Developer Documentation

-  compare(_:) 

Instance Method# compare(_:)

iOS 18.0+iPadOS 18.0+Mac Catalyst 18.0+macOS 15.0+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 2.0+

```
func compare(_ other: Double) -> JSRelationCondition
```

## [Return Value](/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValue/compare(_:)-35b2t#return-value)

A value of JSRelationCondition, a kJSRelationConditionUndefined is returned if an exception is thrown.

## [Discussion](/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValue/compare(_:)-35b2t#discussion)

Compare a JSValue with a double.

The JSValue is converted to a double according to the rules specified by the JavaScript language then compared with other.
